params.receiver: Contract that receives the funds and must repay.

returns.totalCollateralUSD: Total collateral value in USD (8 decimals).
returns.totalDebtUSD: Total debt value in USD (8 decimals).

params.assets: Array of reserve assets to mint for.

params.amount: Amount to repay (type(uint256).max for full debt).
Amount of underlying to withdraw (type(uint256).max for full balance).

borrow(address,uint256).notice: Borrow underlying asset against supplied collateral.

getBorrowIndex(address).notice: Get current borrow index for an asset (used by debtToken).

getLiquidityIndex(address).notice: Get current liquidity index for an asset (used by gToken).

getReserveData(address).notice: Get total deposited and borrowed for a reserve.

getUserAccountData(address).notice: Get a user's health factor and account data.

mintToTreasury(address[]).notice: Mint accrued protocol revenue to treasury as gTokens.

supply(address,uint256).notice: Deposit underlying asset to earn interest.

treasury().notice: Treasury address (receives protocol revenue — should be UBIFeeSplitter)

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw underlying asset by burning gTokens.
